all.en: Mom had been planning Dad's fiftieth birthday party in secret for two whole months.
all.zh: 媽媽已經偷偷策劃爸爸五十歲的生日派對整整兩個月了。

all.en: She invited his colleagues, college friends, and relatives from all over the country.
all.zh: 她邀請了他的同事、大學朋友，還有來自全國各地的親戚。

all.en: The hardest part was keeping the kids quiet about the whole thing.
all.zh: 最難的部分是要孩子們保密這整件事。

all.en: Twelve-year-old Daniel almost let it slip during breakfast on Saturday morning.
all.zh: 十二歲的丹尼爾星期六早上吃早餐時差點說溜了嘴。

all.en: Luckily, Mom quickly changed the subject and gave him a warning look.
all.zh: 還好媽媽很快轉移話題，並給了他一個警告的眼神。

all.en: While Dad was at the gym, twenty guests quietly arrived and hid in the living room.
all.zh: 爸爸去健身房時，二十位客人悄悄抵達並躲在客廳裡。

all.en: Daniel was assigned to greet Dad at the door and bring him inside.
all.zh: 丹尼爾被指派在門口迎接爸爸，並把他帶進屋裡。

all.en: When Dad opened the door, the lights flashed on and everyone shouted "Surprise!"
all.zh: 當爸爸打開門時，燈一下子全亮了，所有人大喊「驚喜！」

all.en: Dad froze for a moment, then his eyes filled with tears.
all.zh: 爸爸愣了一下，然後眼睛盈滿淚水。

all.en: His best friend from college had flown all the way from Canada just for this.
all.zh: 他大學最要好的朋友特地從加拿大飛來參加這場派對。

all.en: Mom presented a huge chocolate cake with fifty candles, which took ages to blow out.
all.zh: 媽媽端出一個有五十根蠟燭的大巧克力蛋糕，吹了好久才吹熄。

all.en: Dad hugged Mom tightly and whispered that this was the best birthday of his life.
all.zh: 爸爸緊緊抱住媽媽，輕聲說這是他這輩子最棒的生日。

all.en: After everyone had eaten, Dad's college friend stood up and gave a touching speech.
all.zh: 大家用餐後，爸爸的大學朋友站起來發表了一段感人的致詞。

all.en: He told funny stories from their student days that even Mom had never heard before.
all.zh: 他分享了一些連媽媽都沒聽過的學生時代趣事。

all.en: Dad laughed until his face turned red and his eyes watered all over again.
all.zh: 爸爸笑到臉都紅了，眼淚又一次湧了出來。

all.en: Daniel surprised everyone by performing a guitar song he had secretly learned for the party.
all.zh: 丹尼爾讓所有人驚訝的是，他演奏了一首為派對偷偷練習的吉他曲。

all.en: Dad couldn't believe his son had practiced so hard without making a single noise at home.
all.zh: 爸爸不敢相信兒子能在家裡完全不出聲地練到這麼熟。

all.en: Mom presented a photo album she had collected from friends and relatives across the years.
all.zh: 媽媽拿出一本她多年來向親友收集照片做成的相簿。

all.en: Dad flipped through the pages slowly, recognizing faces from every chapter of his life.
all.zh: 爸爸慢慢翻著相簿，認出自己人生每個階段的面孔。

all.en: The party lasted past midnight, and the guests sang old songs around the piano.
all.zh: 派對一直到深夜才結束，客人們圍著鋼琴唱起了懷舊老歌。

all.en: When the last guest left, Dad sat on the sofa and quietly thanked his wife again.
all.zh: 最後一位客人離開後，爸爸坐在沙發上再次輕聲向妻子道謝。

all.en: Mom smiled and said his happiness was the only birthday gift she had really wanted.
all.zh: 媽媽微笑說，他的快樂是她真正想要的唯一生日禮物。
